content: {"bugs":{"offer_service":{"issue":"buildIntermediateTier takes top 4 by score with no exclusion of Basic products. buildPremiumTier takes scored[0] with no exclusion of Basic or Intermediate. All three tiers share the same product pool.","fix":"Track usedIds Set across all three tier builders. Basic fills Set with 2 cheapest >=50. Intermediate skips any id in usedIds, takes top 4 by score. Premium skips any id in usedIds, takes highest scorer."},"recommendation_service":{"issue":"Category heuristic awards 30pts based on tagScore comparison (confused logic, not actual category match). All products in same category score nearly identically. No price penalty. No tag bonus. Keywords not stemmed.","fix":"WEIGHTS: category=35,tag=25,budget=25,feature=15. Category: product.category===context.category for 35pts. Budget: -20 penalty if price >30% over budgetMax. Tag: +10 bonus if overlap>60%. Feature: 0 if hasFreetextResponse=false (not neutral 12.5). Add stem() helper for keyword matching."},"products_json":{"issue":"Products lack the top-level category tag (e.g. 'electronics','fashion') that q_category adds to context.tags, causing systematic tag mismatch.","fix":"Add category identifier tag to each product so q_category tag overlap is non-zero. Products already have 26 entries with good price variety ($5-$799)."}}}
